title: Use the AGV Status Screen to Identify Current AGV Location and Presence of Error Codes
summary: Use the documented AGV Status HMI screen as a reference to view AGV location information and determine whether any current AGV error codes are displayed.
when_to_use: Use when a user needs to access the AGV Status screen and verify what AGV location information is shown and whether current AGV error codes are displayed.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to interpret the meaning of AGV error codes, because this source only states that current error codes are shown.
Do not use this runbook for AGV recovery, command execution, or control actions, because this source only documents screen access and displayed status information.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the AGV Status screen, review displayed AGV location and current error code information, and record observations.

safety_notes: This source describes a screen-reference activity only and does not document physical intervention or control actions.
Do not infer the meaning of an error code from this source alone.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the system HMI display

access_required: Access to the system HMI display
system_preconditions: The HMI display is available so the user can press AGV STATUS in the upper-left corner of the display.

visual_references.description: AGV Status screen used to view AGV locations and current AGV error codes.

steps.title: Open the AGV Status screen
steps.purpose: Access the documented HMI screen used for AGV location and current error code visibility.
steps.instruction: On the HMI display, press AGV STATUS in the upper-left corner of the display to access the AGV Status screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV Status screen is visible after pressing AGV STATUS.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV Status screen does not open or the displayed screen does not match the documented AGV Status screen reference.

actions.label: Access AGV Status screen
actions.exact_action: Press AGV STATUS in the upper-left corner of the display.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV STATUS access point and the AGV Status screen layout.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the screen contents do not match the documented screen purpose.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press AGV STATUS in the upper-left corner of the display to access the "AGV Status" screen.

steps.title: Identify AGV location information
steps.purpose: Use the screen for its documented function of showing AGV locations.
steps.instruction: Review the AGV Status screen and identify the information showing the location of AGVs.
steps.expected_result: AGV location information is identified on the AGV Status screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows AGV location information.
steps.failure_condition: AGV location information is not visible or cannot be identified from the displayed screen.

actions.label: Review AGV locations
actions.exact_action: Identify the part of the AGV Status screen that shows the location of AGVs.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV Status screen area showing AGV location information.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the screen contents do not match the documented screen purpose.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "AGV Status" screen shows the location of AGVs and any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing.

steps.title: Check for current AGV error codes
steps.purpose: Determine whether the screen is showing any current AGV error codes.
steps.instruction: Review the AGV Status screen and identify whether any current error codes are displayed for an AGV.
steps.expected_result: The user determines whether current AGV error codes are displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen clearly shows whether current AGV error codes are present.
steps.failure_condition: Current AGV error code visibility cannot be determined from the displayed screen.

actions.label: Review current error codes
actions.exact_action: Identify whether any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing are displayed on the AGV Status screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV Status screen area where current AGV error codes are displayed.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the screen contents do not match the documented screen purpose.
Stop and escalate if interpretation of an error code meaning is required, because this source only states that current error codes are shown.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "AGV Status" screen shows the location of AGVs and any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing.

steps.title: Compare the display to the documented screen purpose
steps.purpose: Confirm that the displayed screen aligns with the documented AGV Status screen function.
steps.instruction: Compare what is shown on the AGV Status screen to the documented purpose of the screen: showing AGV locations and any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing.
steps.expected_result: The displayed screen content matches the documented AGV Status screen purpose.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows AGV locations and current AGV error codes as documented.
steps.failure_condition: The screen contents do not match the documented purpose of the AGV Status screen.

actions.label: Validate screen purpose
actions.exact_action: Compare the displayed AGV Status screen contents to the documented purpose: AGV locations and any current AGV error codes.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The overall AGV Status screen and whether it presents AGV locations and current AGV error codes.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the screen contents do not match the documented screen purpose.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "AGV Status" screen shows the location of AGVs and any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing.

steps.title: Record observed AGV status information
steps.purpose: Capture the observed AGV location information and whether current error codes are present.
steps.instruction: Record the observed AGV location information and whether any current error codes are present on the AGV Status screen.
steps.expected_result: Observed AGV location information and current error code presence are documented.
steps.healthy_condition: The observation record reflects the AGV location information shown and whether current error codes are present.
steps.failure_condition: Observed AGV location information or current error code presence is not recorded.

actions.label: Document observations
actions.exact_action: Record the observed AGV location information and whether any current error codes are present.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV Status screen information being recorded for AGV locations and current error code presence.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if interpretation of an error code meaning is required, because this source only states that current error codes are shown.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "AGV Status" screen shows the location of AGVs and any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing.

success_criteria: The AGV Status screen is accessed successfully.
AGV location information is identified from the screen.
The user determines whether current AGV error codes are displayed.
Observed AGV location information and error code presence are recorded.
healthy_conditions: The AGV Status screen opens from the AGV STATUS control in the upper-left corner of the display.
The screen shows any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing.
failure_conditions: The AGV Status screen cannot be accessed.
The displayed screen contents do not match the documented purpose of the AGV Status screen.
AGV location information cannot be identified.
Current AGV error code presence cannot be determined from the screen.
An error code meaning must be interpreted using information not provided by this source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the screen contents do not match the documented screen purpose.
Escalate if the AGV Status screen cannot be accessed from the documented AGV STATUS control.
Escalate if interpretation of an AGV error code is required, because this source does not define error code meanings.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference image for AGV Status screen access and displayed AGV location and current error code information.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The AGV Status screen shows the location of AGVs and any error codes the AGV is currently experiencing.

missing_details: The source does not provide AGV field names or labels on the AGV Status screen.
The source does not define any AGV error codes or their meanings.
The source does not provide expected AGV values, thresholds, or examples of normal versus abnormal states.
The source does not specify where or how observations should be recorded.
